task_description: Replace colored dot indicators next to individual medication reminder times with checkboxes that call confirmMedicationIntake, allowing users to confirm each specific dose was taken with strikethrough styling for confirmed times.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds. npm run lint shows only pre-existing errors in an unrelated file (MedicationReminderAlert.tsx). No test framework is configured so test quality check is skipped. Post-review fix applied: time checkboxes now disabled when isTaken is true to prevent flicker from no-op uncheck attempts.
